title: azelia
description: A simple visual and sound based improvement modpack
body:
Dive into a beautifully enhanced Minecraft experience with the azelia Modpack. This collection focuses on improving the visual and sound design of the game while keeping the core gameplay intact. Ideal for players who appreciate the classic feel of Minecraft but want to enjoy stunning visuals and immersive sounds.

1. Visual Enhancements
Transform your world with an array of visual mods that enrich your Minecraft experience:

- Complementary Shaders - Unbound: Elevate your graphics with stunning lighting and shading effects that create a more realistic and immersive environment.
- Better Foliage: Add depth and detail to your landscapes with lush vegetation and dynamic foliage, making every biome feel alive.
- Nicer Skies: Enjoy beautiful, dynamic skies that change with the time of day, enhancing your visual experience.
- 3D Crops Revamped: Experience crops like never before with three-dimensional models that add realism to farming.
- Entity Culling: Improve performance while enhancing visual clarity by only rendering nearby entities, ensuring a smoother experience.

2.  Sound Enhancements
Immerse yourself in a richer audio landscape with these sound mods:

- Dynamic Surroundings: Fabric Edition: Enhance environmental sounds, making every biome feel distinct and alive with unique audio cues.
- Sound Physics Remastered: Enjoy realistic sound behavior, where echoes and reverb add depth to your audio experience.
- Presence Footsteps: Experience dynamic footstep sounds that change based on the surface you're walking on, adding a layer of immersion.
- AmbientSounds: Fill your world with ambient soundscapes that reflect the environment, from gentle rain to rustling leaves, creating a truly immersive atmosphere.

2. Map Feature
  
- Antique Atlas: Navigate your world with the Antique Atlas mod, allowing you to track your adventures on a beautifully styled map, blending nostalgia with functionality.


With the azelia Modpack, you’ll enjoy a classic Minecraft experience enriched with stunning visuals and captivating sounds, making each adventure even more memorable. Perfect for players who cherish the original gameplay but want to explore a beautifully crafted world!
